creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #7)
I built it a few times and it seems like that it builds fine without it, so let's remove it.
It was added in 2020: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=250491#c5
I think maybe the old version had some problem, which has been fixed.
